## LibraryRuntime.Internal.scaleVersion() function

Scales a filling recipe version to a target weight.

This is the core scaling function that operates directly on a version. Use this when you already have the version object and its ID.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function scaleVersion(version: IFillingRecipeVersion, sourceVersionId: FillingVersionId, targetWeight: Measurement, options?: IVersionScaleOptions): Result<IComputedScaledFillingRecipe>;
```
